fr.notes: French is the default language. Celtic terms are used naturally.

en.celtic_gloss: Keep Celtic terms (nemeton, rune, sidhe, dolmen, korrigans, brume, menhir, cairn) in their original form but add a brief English gloss the first time each appears in a run (e.g., 'the nemeton — a sacred grove'). After the first mention, use the Celtic term alone.

es.celtic_gloss: Mantiene los terminos celtas (nemeton, rune, sidhe, dolmen, korrigans) en su forma original pero anade una breve glosa en espanol la primera vez (ej: 'el nemeton — bosque sagrado').

it.celtic_gloss: Mantieni i termini celtici nella loro forma originale ma aggiungi una breve glossa in italiano la prima volta.

pt.celtic_gloss: Mantenha os termos celtas na forma original mas adicione uma breve glosa em portugues na primeira vez.

zh.celtic_gloss: Keep Celtic terms in their original form but add a brief Chinese translation in parentheses the first time.

ja.celtic_gloss: Keep Celtic terms in their original form but add a brief Japanese translation in parentheses the first time.

_default.celtic_gloss: Keep Celtic terms (nemeton, rune, sidhe, dolmen, korrigans) in their original form but add a brief translation the first time each appears.

_meta.description: Language directives injected into LLM system prompts. Celtic vocabulary strategy: native (keep as-is) or gloss_first (add translation on first use).
